{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

revision.text:
{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." == Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)
[[Category:Roads in Tokyo]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Waseda Dori}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Waseda Dori}}[[Category:qq]] <!--Waseda Dori-->[[Category:Waseda Dori]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Waseda Dori]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Waseda Dori}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Waseda Dori}}[[Category:qq]] <!--Waseda Dori-->[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:早稲田通り]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:aseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Waseda Dori]][[Category:qq]]

Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

{{Confusion|Sōdai Street}} {{Infobox road |Name = Waseda Street |Icon = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |Additional name = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} |Direction = East-West |Starting point = {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} |Ending point = Tokyo {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} |Type = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名}} }} [[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]] '''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区}} to {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami City|ja|杉並区}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田}}, {{ill|Nakano City|ja|中野区}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線}} (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線}} (Fuji Highway)

revision.text:
{{混同|早大通り}} {{Infobox road |名前 = 早稲田通り |アイコン = {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=25|width=100}}{{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=東京|number=438|width=100}} |名前の補足 = [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|東京都道25号]]・[[東京都道438号向井町新町線|東京都道438号]]の通称 |道路の方角 = 東西 |起点方角 = |起点 = [[東京都]][[千代田区]] |終点方角 = |終点 = 東京都[[杉並区]] |種別・系統 = [[東京都通称道路名]] | }} [[画像:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|西早稲田交差点（2004年12月）]] '''早稲田通り'''（わせだどおり）は、[[東京都]][[千代田区]]から[[杉並区]]に至る道路区間の通称（東京都通称道路名）である。[[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]の一部と、[[東京都道438号向井町新町線]]の全線から構成される<ref name="token">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=東京都建設局}}</ref>。かつては'''昭和通り'''と呼ばれた<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=中野区史 昭和編 3 |publisher=東京都[[中野区]]|year=1973 |page=697}}（[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 オンライン版当該ページ]、国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション）「''昭和通り（現在の早稲田通り）''」とある。</ref>。
本項では、[[杉並区]]にて早稲田通りから分岐し、[[練馬区]]に至る'''旧早稲田通り'''（きゅうわせだどおり）についても説明する。
== 概要 == 千代田区九段北の田安門交差点（靖国通り）から[[新宿区]][[西早稲田]]、[[中野区]]中野などを経由し、[[杉並区]][[上井草]]（青梅街道）に至る。起点では靖国通りから北西へ進行するが、徐々に西北西に向きを変え、終点では西南西に向けて青梅街道へ接続する。旧早稲田通りは途中の杉並区本天沼二丁目交差点から北西へ行き、練馬区石神井台に至る。いずれの名称も東京都建設局によって付与されたものである<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=一覧表|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=東京都建設局}}</ref>。また早稲田通りのうち、神楽坂下交差点～神楽坂上交差点（新宿区区内）の区間については、新宿区により「[[神楽坂]]通り」の通称も与えられている<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf（道路通称名路線図）|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=新宿区}}</ref>。
新宿区の神楽坂通り区間は午前は東行き、午後は西行きの逆転式一方通行が設定されているほか、旧早稲田通りの終点付近も起点に向かう一方通行となっている。
早稲田通りという通称はもともと「田安門{{～}}{{ウィキ座標|35|44|52.098|N|139|34|08.749|E|scale:2500|保谷新道交点}}」について設定されていた。しかし、[[1984年]]（昭和59年）に「田安門～[[井草八幡宮|井草八幡]]前」に変更されると同時に、この改正で早稲田通りの指定から外れた「[[本天沼]]二丁目～保谷新道交点」の区間については、旧早稲田通りという通称が設定された。2017年現在、旧早稲田通りの通称は富士街道交点までの区間についてのみ設定されており、残りの富士街道交点～保谷新道交点区間には設定されていない。
== 起終点 == ; 早稲田通り * 起点：{{ウィキ座標|35|41|42.072|N|139|44|55.824|E|scale:2500|田安門交差点}}（千代田区九段北2<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道302号新宿両国線]]（靖国通り）交点<ref group="注">[[東京都道401号麹町竹平線]]（[[内堀通り]]）との重複区間上</ref> * 終点：{{ウィキ座標|35|43|01.297|N|139|35|47.753|E|scale:2500|井草八幡前交差点}}（杉並区上井草4<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線]]（[[青梅街道]]）交点
; 旧早稲田通り * 起点：{{ウィキ座標|35|42|59.692|N|139|37|37.250|E|scale:2500|本天沼二丁目交差点}}（杉並区下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]・[[東京都道438号向井町新町線]]（早稲田通り）交点 * 終点：{{ウィキ座標|35|44|17.560|N|139|35|04.697|E|scale:2500|（交差点名称無し）}}（練馬区石神井台5<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道8号千代田練馬田無線]]（[[富士街道]]）交点
== 構成道路 == ; 早稲田通り * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]] - 神楽坂上～本天沼二丁目 * [[東京都道438号向井町新町線]] - 本天沼二丁目～井草八幡前（全線） 起点から神楽坂上までは、区道（千代田区・新宿区）に属する<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.sonicweb-asp.jp/shinjuku/map?scale=2000&pos=139.7434231736842,35.70166879132791#scale=1000&pos=139.74263380998846,35.70051777495172|title=新宿区みんなのＧＩＳ（新宿区道路台帳）|accessdate=2017-11-12|publisher=新宿区}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.city.chiyoda.lg.jp/koho/machizukuri/tochi/rosenmozu/documents/rosenmozu2809.pdf|title=千代田区路線網図|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=千代田区}}</ref>。
; 旧早稲田通り * 東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線 - 本天沼二丁目～石神井台五丁目
== 通過する自治体 == ; 早稲田通り * [[東京都]] ** [[千代田区]] ** [[新宿区]] ** [[中野区]] ** [[杉並区]]
; 旧早稲田通り * 東京都 ** 杉並区 ** [[練馬区]]
== 交差・接続している道路 == ; 早稲田通り * [[東京都道302号新宿両国線]]（[[内堀通り]]） - 田安門（起点） * [[東京都道405号外濠環状線]]（外堀通り） - 神楽坂下 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]・[[東京都道433号神楽坂高円寺線]]（[[大久保通り]]） - 神楽坂上 * [[東京都道319号環状三号線]]（[[外苑東通り]]） - 弁天町 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]（支線）（[[諏訪通り (東京都)|諏訪通り]]） - 馬場下町 * [[東京都道305号芝新宿王子線]]（[[明治通り (東京都)|明治通り]]） - 馬場口 * [[東京都道317号環状六号線]]（山手通り） - 上落合2 * [[東京都道420号鮫洲大山線]]（中野通り） - 新井 * [[東京都道318号環状七号線]]（環七通り） - 大和陸橋 * [[東京都道427号瀬田貫井線]]（中杉通り） - 阿佐谷北6 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]（旧早稲田通り） - 本天沼2 * [[東京都道311号環状八号線]]（環八通り） - 清水3 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線]]（[[青梅街道]]） - 井草八幡前（終点）
; 旧早稲田通り * [[東京都道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]・[[東京都道438号向井町新町線]]（早稲田通り） - 本天沼2（起点） * [[東京都道440号落合井草線]]（[[新青梅街道]]、交差点名称無し） - 八成小学校、井草公園前 * [[東京都道439号椎名町上石神井線]]（[[千川通り]]） - 八成橋 * [[東京都道311号環状八号線]]（環八通り） * [[東京都道444号下石神井大泉線]]（井草通り） - 石神井小前 * [[東京都道8号千代田練馬田無線]]（[[富士街道]]、交差点名称無し）
== 沿線の主な施設 == === 千代田区 === *[[日本武道館]] *[[靖国神社]] *[[九段下駅]] *[[日本歯科大学]]（飯田橋キャンパス）
=== 新宿区 === * [[飯田橋駅]] * [[地域医療機能推進機構東京新宿メディカルセンター]]（旧称:東京厚生年金病院） * 牛込消防署 * [[神楽坂駅]] * [[早稲田駅]] * [[穴八幡宮]] <!--* [[都営バス早稲田営業所]] * [[早稲田停留場]]--> * [[学習院大学]] * [[早稲田大学]]（[[早稲田大学早稲田キャンパス|早稲田キャンパス]]・[[早稲田大学戸山キャンパス|戸山キャンパス]]） * [[早稲田松竹]] * [[高田馬場駅]] * [[落合駅 (東京都)|落合駅]] ::[[東京メトロ東西線]]が神楽坂駅〜落合駅間で当道路の地下を通っている。
=== 中野区 === * [[都営バス小滝橋営業所]] * [[関東バス]]本社 * [[落合郵便局 (東京都)|落合郵便局]] * [[東中野駅]] * [[中野ブロードウェイ]] * [[中野駅 (東京都)|中野駅]] * [[中野区役所]] * [[中野サンプラザ]] * [[中野四季の街]] * [[野方警察署]] * [[東京警察病院]] *[[早稲田大学|早稲田大学（中野キャンパス）]]
=== 杉並区 === * [[高円寺駅]] * [[阿佐ケ谷駅]] * [[関東バス阿佐谷営業所]] * [[下井草駅]] * [[井草八幡宮]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group=注}} === 出典 === {{reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[早稲田]] * [[日本の道路一覧]] * [[所沢道]]

== 概要 == 千代田区九段北の田安門交差点（靖国通り）から[[新宿区]][[西早稲田]]、[[中野区]]中野などを経由し、[[杉並区]][[上井草]]（青梅街道）に至る。起点では靖国通りから北西へ進行するが、徐々に西北西に向きを変え、終点では西南西に向けて青梅街道へ接続する。旧早稲田通りは途中の杉並区本天沼二丁目交差点から北西へ行き、練馬区石神井台に至る。いずれの名称も東京都建設局によって付与されたものである<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=一覧表|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=東京都建設局}}</ref>。また早稲田通りのうち、神楽坂下交差点～神楽坂上交差点（新宿区区内）の区間については、新宿区により「[[神楽坂]]通り」の通称も与えられている<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf（道路通称名路線図）|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=新宿区}}</ref>。
新宿区の神楽坂通り区間は午前は東行き、午後は西行きの逆転式一方通行が設定されているほか、旧早稲田通りの終点付近も起点に向かう一方通行となっている。
早稲田通りという通称はもともと「田安門{{～}}{{ウィキ座標|35|44|52.098|N|139|34|08.749|E|scale:2500|保谷新道交点}}」について設定されていた。しかし、[[1984年]]（昭和59年）に「田安門～[[井草八幡宮|井草八幡]]前」に変更されると同時に、この改正で早稲田通りの指定から外れた「[[本天沼]]二丁目～保谷新道交点」の区間については、旧早稲田通りという通称が設定された。2017年現在、旧早稲田通りの通称は富士街道交点までの区間についてのみ設定されており、残りの富士街道交点～保谷新道交点区間には設定されていない。
== 起終点 == ; 早稲田通り * 起点：{{ウィキ座標|35|41|42.072|N|139|44|55.824|E|scale:2500|田安門交差点}}（千代田区九段北2<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道302号新宿両国線]]（靖国通り）交点<ref group="注">[[東京都道401号麹町竹平線]]（[[内堀通り]]）との重複区間上</ref> * 終点：{{ウィキ座標|35|43|01.297|N|139|35|47.753|E|scale:2500|井草八幡前交差点}}（杉並区上井草4<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線]]（[[青梅街道]]）交点
; 旧早稲田通り * 起点：{{ウィキ座標|35|42|59.692|N|139|37|37.250|E|scale:2500|本天沼二丁目交差点}}（杉並区下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]・[[東京都道438号向井町新町線]]（早稲田通り）交点 * 終点：{{ウィキ座標|35|44|17.560|N|139|35|04.697|E|scale:2500|（交差点名称無し）}}（練馬区石神井台5<ref name="ichiran" />） - [[東京都道8号千代田練馬田無線]]（[[富士街道]]）交点
== 構成道路 == ; 早稲田通り * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]] - 神楽坂上～本天沼二丁目 * [[東京都道438号向井町新町線]] - 本天沼二丁目～井草八幡前（全線） 起点から神楽坂上までは、区道（千代田区・新宿区）に属する<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.sonicweb-asp.jp/shinjuku/map?scale=2000&pos=139.7434231736842,35.70166879132791#scale=1000&pos=139.74263380998846,35.70051777495172|title=新宿区みんなのＧＩＳ（新宿区道路台帳）|accessdate=2017-11-12|publisher=新宿区}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.city.chiyoda.lg.jp/koho/machizukuri/tochi/rosenmozu/documents/rosenmozu2809.pdf|title=千代田区路線網図|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=千代田区}}</ref>。
; 旧早稲田通り * 東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線 - 本天沼二丁目～石神井台五丁目
== 通過する自治体 == ; 早稲田通り * [[東京都]] ** [[千代田区]] ** [[新宿区]] ** [[中野区]] ** [[杉並区]]
; 旧早稲田通り * 東京都 ** 杉並区 ** [[練馬区]]
== 交差・接続している道路 == ; 早稲田通り * [[東京都道302号新宿両国線]]（[[内堀通り]]） - 田安門（起点） * [[東京都道405号外濠環状線]]（外堀通り） - 神楽坂下 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]・[[東京都道433号神楽坂高円寺線]]（[[大久保通り]]） - 神楽坂上 * [[東京都道319号環状三号線]]（[[外苑東通り]]） - 弁天町 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]（支線）（[[諏訪通り (東京都)|諏訪通り]]） - 馬場下町 * [[東京都道305号芝新宿王子線]]（[[明治通り (東京都)|明治通り]]） - 馬場口 * [[東京都道317号環状六号線]]（山手通り） - 上落合2 * [[東京都道420号鮫洲大山線]]（中野通り） - 新井 * [[東京都道318号環状七号線]]（環七通り） - 大和陸橋 * [[東京都道427号瀬田貫井線]]（中杉通り） - 阿佐谷北6 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]（旧早稲田通り） - 本天沼2 * [[東京都道311号環状八号線]]（環八通り） - 清水3 * [[東京都道・埼玉県道4号東京所沢線]]（[[青梅街道]]） - 井草八幡前（終点）
; 旧早稲田通り * [[東京都道25号飯田橋石神井新座線]]・[[東京都道438号向井町新町線]]（早稲田通り） - 本天沼2（起点） * [[東京都道440号落合井草線]]（[[新青梅街道]]、交差点名称無し） - 八成小学校、井草公園前 * [[東京都道439号椎名町上石神井線]]（[[千川通り]]） - 八成橋 * [[東京都道311号環状八号線]]（環八通り） * [[東京都道444号下石神井大泉線]]（井草通り） - 石神井小前 * [[東京都道8号千代田練馬田無線]]（[[富士街道]]、交差点名称無し）
== 沿線の主な施設 == === 千代田区 === *[[日本武道館]] *[[靖国神社]] *[[九段下駅]] *[[日本歯科大学]]（飯田橋キャンパス）
=== 新宿区 === * [[飯田橋駅]] * [[地域医療機能推進機構東京新宿メディカルセンター]]（旧称:東京厚生年金病院） * 牛込消防署 * [[神楽坂駅]] * [[早稲田駅]] * [[穴八幡宮]] <!--* [[都営バス早稲田営業所]] * [[早稲田停留場]]--> * [[学習院大学]] * [[早稲田大学]]（[[早稲田大学早稲田キャンパス|早稲田キャンパス]]・[[早稲田大学戸山キャンパス|戸山キャンパス]]） * [[早稲田松竹]] * [[高田馬場駅]] * [[落合駅 (東京都)|落合駅]] ::[[東京メトロ東西線]]が神楽坂駅〜落合駅間で当道路の地下を通っている。
=== 中野区 === * [[都営バス小滝橋営業所]] * [[関東バス]]本社 * [[落合郵便局 (東京都)|落合郵便局]] * [[東中野駅]] * [[中野ブロードウェイ]] * [[中野駅 (東京都)|中野駅]] * [[中野区役所]] * [[中野サンプラザ]] * [[中野四季の街]] * [[野方警察署]] * [[東京警察病院]] *[[早稲田大学|早稲田大学（中野キャンパス）]]
=== 杉並区 === * [[高円寺駅]] * [[阿佐ケ谷駅]] * [[関東バス阿佐谷営業所]] * [[下井草駅]] * [[井草八幡宮]]

|Ending point     = Tokyo [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]
|Type             = {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|ja|東京都通称道路名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京都内の通り|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Names|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525264}}
}}
[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|qq=|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|qq=|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|qq=|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)
