[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.
This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Overview == Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.
In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.
The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.
== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

== Starting and Ending Points == ; Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref> * Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection
; Old Waseda Street * Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}} * Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]]. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]]|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in [[:en:Suginami|Suginami City]] and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano City]] Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4]] (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Suginami|en|Suginami|WD=Q232631|lt=Suginami City}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano, Tokyo|en|Nakano, Tokyo|WD=Q234087|lt=Nakano City}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami|en|Suginami|WD=Q232631|lt=Suginami City}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Nakano, Tokyo|en|Nakano, Tokyo|WD=Q234087|lt=Nakano City}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>

[[File:WasedaDori2004-12-11.jpg|thumb|240px|right|Intersection in Nishi-Waseda (December 2004)]]
'''Waseda Street''' (わせだどおり) is the common name (東京都通称道路名) for a section of road running from {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|1=Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7473516}}{{ill|Chiyoda City|ja|千代町区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiyoda City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Suginami|en|Suginami|WD=Q232631|lt=Suginami City}}. It is composed of parts of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} and the entirety of {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}<ref name="token">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006219.pdf|title=パンフ用全図_pdf|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. It was formerly called '''Showa Street''' (昭和通り)<ref>{{Cite book|lang=ja|title=Nakano City History, Showa Edition 3|publisher=Tokyo {{ill|Nakano, Tokyo|en|Nakano, Tokyo|WD=Q234087|lt=Nakano City}}|year=1973|page=697}} ([https://dl.ndl.go.jp/ja/pid/9641100/1/365 Online version], National Diet Library Digital Collection) where it states "''Showa Street (currently Waseda Street)''".</ref>.

This article also describes the '''Old Waseda Street''' (旧わせだどおり), which branches from Waseda Street in {{ill|Suginami|en|Suginami|WD=Q232631|lt=Suginami City}} and leads to {{ill|Nerima City|ja|純馬区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nerima City|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Overview ==
Waseda Street runs from the Tayasumon Intersection (Yasukuni Street) in Kudankita, Chiyoda City, passing through {{ill|Nishi-Waseda|ja|西日田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-Waseda|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Nakano, Tokyo|en|Nakano, Tokyo|WD=Q234087|lt=Nakano City}} Nakano, and ends at Kamigusa, Suginami City (on Ome Highway). It initially heads northwest from Yasukuni Street, gradually shifts to west-northwest, and finally southwest to connect with Ome Highway at its terminus. Old Waseda Street diverges from Waseda Street at the Hontanumacho 2-chome intersection in Suginami City and heads northwest, terminating in Shakujidai, Nerima City. Both names were assigned by the Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau<ref name="ichiran">{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.kensetsu.metro.tokyo.jp/content/000006190.pdf|title=Route List|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Tokyo Metropolitan Construction Bureau}}</ref>. Additionally, the section of Waseda Street between the Kagurazaka-shita and Kagurazaka-ue intersections (within Shinjuku City) is also known as "{{ill|Kagurazaka Street|ja|神楽坂通り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Street|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 早稲田通り|1=Waseda-dōri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11511533}}" as designated by Shinjuku City<ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.city.shinjuku.lg.jp/content/000106777.pdf|title=000106777.pdf (Road Alias Map)|accessdate=2017-11-12|format=PDF|publisher=Shinjuku City}}</ref>.

In Shinjuku City, the Kagurazaka Street section is a reversible one-way road: eastbound in the morning and westbound in the afternoon. Additionally, near the terminus of Old Waseda Street, traffic flows one-way toward its starting point.

The name "Waseda Street" was originally designated for the section from "Tayasumon{{~}}{{ill|Hoya New Road Intersection|ja|保谷新道交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoya New Road Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|en|Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|WD=Q11103041|lt=Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4}} (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)

However, in 1984, the designation was revised to cover "Tayasumon to {{ill|Igusa Hachiman Shrine|ja|井草八幡宮|lt=Igusa Hachiman|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachiman Shrine|1=Igusa Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11373756}}." Consequently, the section from Hontanumacho 2-chome to the Hoya New Road Intersection, excluded from the revised Waseda Street designation, was assigned the name "Old Waseda Street." As of 2017, the "Old Waseda Street" designation applies only to the section up to the Fuji Highway intersection; the remaining section from the Fuji Highway intersection to the Hoya New Road Intersection lacks a designation.

== Starting and Ending Points ==
; Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Tayasumon Intersection|ja|田安門交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tayasumon Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (千代町区九段北 2<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|ja|東京都道302号新宿両国線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 302|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 302|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11102993}} (Yasukuni Street) Intersection<ref group="note">Located within an overlapping section with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja|東京都道401号麻岐町竹平線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 401|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Uchibori Street)</ref>
* Ending Point: {{ill|Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja|井草八幡前交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igusa Hachimanmae Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区上井草 4<ref name="ichiran" />) - {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|en|Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 4|WD=Q11103041|lt=Tokyo Metropolitan Route 4}} (Ome Highway) Intersection

; Old Waseda Street
* Starting Point: {{ill|Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja|本天江町 2 丁目 交差点|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hontanumacho 2-chome Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (杉並区 下井草1<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|ja|東京都道・埼玉県道25号飯田橋石神井新座線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 25|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road and Saitama Prefectural Road Route 25|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11103040}} / {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|ja|東京都道438号向井町新町線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 438|1=Tokyo Metropolitan Road Route 438|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11525802}}
* Ending Point: {{ill|Unnamed Intersection|ja|(名称なし交差点)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unnamed Intersection|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (純馬区 石神井台 5<ref name="ichiran" />) - Intersection with {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja|東京都道8号千代町純馬田無線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Fuji Highway)
